# Chandan Shakya — Portfolio & Blog

> Web Developer, Researcher, and Social Engineer from Kathmandu, Nepal. Linux enthusiast with a decade of tinkering experience.

## About
Personal portfolio showcasing projects, blog posts, and technical writing. Built with Astro, styled with Stardew Valley-inspired pixel art aesthetic.

## Key Sections
- [Projects](https://chandanshakya.com.np/projects) — 27 projects across Laravel, Python, Docker, and more
- [Blog](https://chandanshakya.com.np/blog) — 9 technical articles on Laravel, PHP, MySQL, and web development
- [Archive](https://chandanshakya.com.np/archive) — Complete timeline of all content

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/ChandanShakya
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/ZXY_CC_3ag13
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ChandanShakya
- Email: Via contact form at https://chandanshakya.com.np/#contact

## Tech Stack
Astro 7, Tailwind CSS, Shiki syntax highlighting, Formspree, Disqus comments

## Location
Kathmandu, Nepal
